title: Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're an ebook author in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, you know the frustration of trying to sell digital products on platforms like PayPal, Gumroad, or Payhip, only to be blocked due to country restrictions. You're not alone. Many creators face this same problem, and it's not just limited to these countries. But what nobody tells you before you choose a solution is that there's a better way to sell ebooks without relying on these platforms.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip claim to be global platforms, but the reality is that they exclude specific countries due to banking, regulatory, or KYC requirements. For instance, PayPal blocks many African countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya, forcing creators to look for alternative payment solutions. Meanwhile, Gumroad's blocked countries list is a long one, with many creators facing restrictions due to their location. In contrast, NOWPayments, our recommended payment processor, offers a decentralized solution that allows creators to accept payments from anywhere in the world without the need for KYC or bank accounts.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, traditional platforms often fall short. They may block transactions, hold funds, or even freeze accounts without warning. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's infrastructure are designed to work around these restrictions, ensuring that creators can receive payments without interruption. With our solution, you can sell ebooks to customers in restricted countries without worrying about your funds being held or your account being frozen.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Another critical factor is payment speed, fees, and real costs. Traditional platforms often charge high fees, take days to process payments, and may even hold funds for extended periods. In contrast, NOWPayments offers fast payment processing, low fees, and instant fund transfer. With our solution, you can receive payments within minutes, not days, and enjoy low fees that won't eat into your profits.
Traditional platforms may claim to be global, but the reality is that they exclude specific countries due to banking, regulatory, or KYC requirements.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing crypto-native infrastructure does not mean your buyers need to understand crypto. The Web3 Wallet Connect module generates QR codes for each supported coin, displays live USD-equivalent prices, and guides buyers through the payment flow in plain language. Most buyers complete a crypto payment in under two minutes, even if it is their first time. NOWPayments handles the transaction confirmation and fires the webhook that triggers automated delivery. From the buyer's perspective, they paid and received their product. From your perspective, you received funds in a wallet you control without any platform intermediary between you and your revenue. That is the practical outcome of building on the right infrastructure from the start.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country? You can use NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, which offers a decentralized, KYC-free payment solution that allows you to sell digital products to customers in restricted countries. Our solution includes automated delivery, low fees, and real-time analytics, making it easy to sell ebooks and other digital products without relying on traditional platforms.

NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's solution offers automated delivery, low fees, and real-time analytics, making it easy to sell ebooks and other digital products without relying on traditional platforms.
